title: bothriochloa hassleri
intro: Bothriochloa hassleri, also known as Hassler's bluestem, is a type of grass native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bothriochloa hassleri include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grounding the leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
